Role Permissions

Super Admin

4 permissions
  • Full Access
  • Manage Staff
  • Financial Control
  • System Settings

Admin

4 permissions
  • Manage Users
  • Approve Applications
  • View Payments
  • Edit Content

Moderator

3 permissions
  • Review Applications
  • View Users
  • Send Notifications
